message:
feat(calibrate): add hierarchical priors with EB shrinkage by category

Implements category-conditioned Beta parameters that shrink toward global
class priors. Small/rare categories get strong shrinkage preventing
overconfident posteriors; large categories let data dominate. Includes
provenance formatting for explainability ledger.

Closes process_triage-nao.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
